level4_start.text: The air feels thinner now. You can’t shake the sensation of being stalked.

level4_sensations_1.text: Every muscle aches. It feels like your body has experienced death, rebirth, and hell all at once.

level4_sensations_2.text: The voice that spoke to you, you try to make it disappear. Turn his voice back into a mystery.

asking_about_valor.text: The silence was too much for the voice to eventually return. So, you turn to Antakin and finally ask the question that’s been haunting you.

asking_about_valor_2.text: You ask her about Valor. Who she really was... and why she left.

choices.text: What really happened before I woke up?
Did she request you to take care of me?

antakin_revelation_protege.mageText: Well, to be frank, I discovered a letter that today was the day you'd be awake from your slumber.

antakin_revelation_guessing.mageText: Didn't really require any strength to realize that the letter was from Valor.

antakin_revelation_protege_2.mageText: She wanted you to be the next protégé. The one to carry her magic deck.

antakin_giggles.mageText: Heh... honestly, I couldn't help but giggle. No offense, but you're just a frail human.

antakin_giggles_2.mageText: How did she see it in you? What did she know that I'm missing?

player_valor_doubt_choice.text: You look at your hands, then back at Antakin.

choices.text: Did she really see something in me?
Well, I doubt she was right.

antakin_response_vision.mageText: I don't know. But she had a sense for the world. She saw beauty where we see mess.

antakin_response_vision_2.mageText: If she bet on you, she had a reason. I trust her judgment over mine.

antakin_response_doubt.mageText: Heh, I have my doubts too. You're a mess, kid.

antakin_response_doubt_2.mageText: But it feels wrong to doubt someone I trust so much. If she chose you, I'll follow.

path_becomes_silent.text: The path remains silent for twenty minutes. Only the sound of your boots on the gravel remains.

mordu_fades_1.text: Within those past minutes, the lingering of doubt began to fade.

mordu_fades_2.text: Hope was reignited. Mind began to clear.

mordu_fades_3.text: The voices are gone. That feeling of being watched? It finally vanished.

level4_conclusion.text: You find yourself smiling as you think of Valor. It would be such honor to find out what truly happened.

antakin_final.mageText: We're here. The Bay of Truth.

bay_of_truth.text: In front of you is the Bay of Truth, home of the Murmuring Siren... Aelthred.
